[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111101 6
1 1001010 3
2 0001101 3
3 0011111 5
4 1101101 5
5 1011110 5
6 1001110 4
7 1111011 6

12 21 1111111 a

34 43 1001110 4 match 6
45 54 1111111 a
56 65 1111011 6 match 7
67 76 1111111 a
70 07 1111111 a

13 31 1111111 a

71 17 1111111 a

47 74 1111111 a

61 16 1111111 a
72 27 1111111 a

37 73 1111111 a
